hooks.prompt:
Review the changes made in this session. Check if Claude:
1. Introduced unnecessary complexity (deep nesting, premature abstractions, over-engineering)
2. Violated the three-layer architecture (pure core functions, data config layer, shell/sim layer)
3. Added comments that merely restate what the code does
4. Used string literals where existing enums (Position, TargetType, BattleEventType) should be used

If any violations found, respond {"ok": false, "reason": "description"}. Otherwise {"ok": true}.
